---
title: "Live Ops Dashboard"
author: "배진후"
lang: ko
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    scrolling: true
    nav-buttons:
      - text: Portfolio
        href: ../index.html
      - text: DevOps
        href: DevOpsPortfolio.html
---

```{=html}
<style>
.ops-kicker {
  color: #5d667a;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.ops-value {
  color: #172033;
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 3vw, 2.45rem);
  font-weight: 720;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.ops-subtle {
  color: #5d667a;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
}

.ops-status {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.7rem;
  background: #f5f7fb;
  color: #172033;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
}

.ops-dot {
  width: 0.58rem;
  height: 0.58rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #a16207;
}

.ops-dot.ok {
  background: #16815b;
}

.ops-dot.fail {
  background: #c2413d;
}

.ops-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.ops-hop,
.ops-node,
.ops-endpoint-button {
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
}

.ops-hop {
  padding: 0.75rem;
}

.ops-hop strong {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.ops-map {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, 0.8fr) minmax(220px, 1fr) minmax(260px, 1.2fr) minmax(280px, 1.35fr);
  gap: 0.75rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

.ops-lane {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0.65rem;
  align-content: start;
}

.ops-lane-title {
  color: #5d667a;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.ops-node {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 5.4rem;
  padding: 0.8rem;
  color: #172033;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, transform 140ms ease;
}

.ops-node:hover,
.ops-node:focus {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.14);
  outline: none;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.ops-node.active {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.18);
}

.ops-node.edge {
  border-left: 5px solid #a16207;
}

.ops-node.k8s {
  border-left: 5px solid #16815b;
}

.ops-node.proxmox {
  border-left: 5px solid #2563eb;
}

.ops-node.storage {
  border-left: 5px solid #7c3aed;
}

.ops-node strong,
.ops-endpoint-button strong {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.24rem;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.ops-node code,
.ops-endpoint-button code {
  color: #5d667a;
  background: #f5f7fb;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  white-space: normal;
}

.ops-node-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  margin-top: 0.45rem;
}

.ops-endpoint-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
  gap: 0.6rem;
}

.ops-endpoint-button {
  min-height: 5.1rem;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  color: #172033;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.ops-endpoint-button:hover,
.ops-endpoint-button:focus {
  border-color: #16815b;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(22, 129, 91, 0.14);
  outline: none;
}

.ops-response-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.ops-response-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.45rem;
}

.ops-action-button {
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #172033;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.68rem;
}

.ops-action-button:hover,
.ops-action-button:focus {
  border-color: #2563eb;
  outline: none;
}

.ops-code {
  max-height: 27rem;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee8;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #101827;
  color: #e6edf7;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
  padding: 0.8rem;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.ops-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.ops-table th,
.ops-table td {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e6e9f0;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.5rem;
  text-align: left;
  vertical-align: top;
}

.ops-table th {
  color: #5d667a;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.ops-table .sr-only {
  position: absolute;
  width: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: -1px;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  border: 0;
}

.ops-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.12rem 0.45rem;
  background: #f5f7fb;
  color: #172033;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.ops-pill.running,
.ops-pill.online,
.ops-pill.up {
  background: #e8f6ef;
  color: #166044;
}

.ops-pill.stopped,
.ops-pill.down,
.ops-pill.fail,
.ops-pill.error {
  background: #faecea;
  color: #9b2f2b;
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .ops-map {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  .ops-map {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>
```

## Row {height="18%"}

::: {.valuebox icon="activity" color="success"}
Prometheus Targets

<div class="ops-value" id="targets-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="targets-detail">ops-api.mintcocoa.cc 연결 중</div>
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="hdd-network" color="primary"}
Kubernetes Pods

<div class="ops-value" id="pods-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="pods-detail">Prometheus kube-state-metrics</div>
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="server" color="info"}
Proxmox Node

<div class="ops-value" id="node-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="node-detail">172.30.1.12 API token auth</div>
:::

::: {.valuebox icon="pc-display" color="warning"}
Virtual Machines

<div class="ops-value" id="vm-value">Loading</div>
<div class="ops-subtle" id="vm-detail">running / total</div>
:::

## Row {height="45%"}

::: {.card title="Interactive Homelab Flow"}
```{=html}
<div class="ops-map" aria-label="Homelab architecture API map">
  <div class="ops-lane">
    <div class="ops-lane-title">Entry</div>
    <button class="ops-node edge" data-endpoint="/api/health" data-title="Public Ops API Health">
      <strong>ops-api.mintcocoa.cc</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">외부에서 접근하는 read-only 운영 API</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <span class="ops-pill" id="map-api-status">checking</span>
      </div>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-node edge" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="Dashboard Summary">
      <strong>Edge Plane</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">172.30.1.27 reverse proxy / HAProxy</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/ops/summary</code>
      </div>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="ops-lane">
    <div class="ops-lane-title">Kubernetes / Prometheus</div>
    <button class="ops-node k8s" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/summary" data-title="Prometheus Summary">
      <strong>Prometheus</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">targets, pods, deployments, PVC metric series</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <span class="ops-pill" id="map-prom-status">checking</span>
        <code>/api/prometheus/summary</code>
      </div>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-node k8s" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/targets" data-title="Scrape Targets">
      <strong>Scrape Targets</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">Prometheus active target 상태</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/prometheus/targets</code>
      </div>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-node k8s" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=count(kube_pod_info)" data-title="Pod Metric Query">
      <strong>Kubernetes Workloads</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">kube-state-metrics 기반 workload 수치</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/prometheus/query</code>
      </div>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="ops-lane">
    <div class="ops-lane-title">Proxmox VE</div>
    <button class="ops-node proxmox" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/version" data-title="Proxmox Version">
      <strong>Proxmox VE</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">172.30.1.12 API / auth mode</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <span class="ops-pill" id="map-pve-status">checking</span>
        <code>/api/proxmox/version</code>
      </div>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-node proxmox" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="VM Resources">
      <strong>Kubernetes VMs</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">control-plane, worker, OMV VM inventory</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm</code>
      </div>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-node proxmox" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/nodes" data-title="Proxmox Nodes">
      <strong>Physical Node</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">CPU, memory, uptime summary</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/proxmox/nodes</code>
      </div>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="ops-lane">
    <div class="ops-lane-title">Storage / Network Resources</div>
    <button class="ops-node storage" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage" data-title="Storage Resources">
      <strong>OMV / NFS Storage Path</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">PVC backing storage and Proxmox storage resources</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage</code>
      </div>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-node storage" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=pool" data-title="Proxmox Pools">
      <strong>Resource Pools</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">Proxmox pool inventory</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=pool</code>
      </div>
    </button>
    <button class="ops-node storage" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=sdn" data-title="Proxmox SDN">
      <strong>SDN Resources</strong>
      <span class="ops-subtle">Proxmox SDN resource view</span>
      <div class="ops-node-meta">
        <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=sdn</code>
      </div>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.card title="Live API Explorer"}
```{=html}
<div class="ops-response-header">
  <div>
    <p class="ops-kicker">Selected endpoint</p>
    <strong id="selected-title">Ops Summary</strong>
    <div class="ops-subtle" id="selected-endpoint">/api/ops/summary</div>
  </div>
  <div class="ops-response-actions">
    <button class="ops-action-button" id="run-endpoint-button" type="button">Run</button>
    <a class="ops-action-button" id="open-endpoint-link" href="https://ops-api.mintcocoa.cc/api/ops/summary" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open</a>
  </div>
</div>

<pre class="ops-code" id="endpoint-output">Loading</pre>
```
:::

## Row {height="22%"}

::: {.card title="Live Health"}
```{=html}
<p>
  <span class="ops-status">
    <span class="ops-dot" id="health-dot"></span>
    <span id="health-text">Checking</span>
  </span>
</p>
```

| Check | Status |
|---|---|
| Prometheus | <span id="health-prometheus">Loading</span> |
| Proxmox | <span id="health-proxmox">Loading</span> |
| Auth mode | <span id="health-auth">Loading</span> |
| Updated | <span id="updated-at">Loading</span> |
:::

::: {.card title="Endpoint Catalog"}
```{=html}
<div class="ops-endpoint-grid" id="endpoint-catalog">
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/health" data-title="Health">
    <strong>Health</strong>
    <code>/api/health</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/ops/summary" data-title="Ops Summary">
    <strong>Unified Summary</strong>
    <code>/api/ops/summary</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/query?query=up" data-title="PromQL Query">
    <strong>PromQL Query</strong>
    <code>/api/prometheus/query?query=up</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/targets" data-title="Prometheus Targets">
    <strong>Prometheus Targets</strong>
    <code>/api/prometheus/targets</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/prometheus/summary" data-title="Prometheus Summary">
    <strong>Prometheus Summary</strong>
    <code>/api/prometheus/summary</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/version" data-title="Proxmox Version">
    <strong>Proxmox Version</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/version</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources" data-title="All Proxmox Resources">
    <strong>All Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm" data-title="Proxmox VM Resources">
    <strong>VM Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=vm</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=node" data-title="Proxmox Node Resources">
    <strong>Node Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=node</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage" data-title="Proxmox Storage Resources">
    <strong>Storage Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=storage</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=pool" data-title="Proxmox Pool Resources">
    <strong>Pool Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=pool</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/resources?type=sdn" data-title="Proxmox SDN Resources">
    <strong>SDN Resources</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/resources?type=sdn</code>
  </button>
  <button class="ops-endpoint-button" data-endpoint="/api/proxmox/nodes" data-title="Proxmox Nodes">
    <strong>Nodes</strong>
    <code>/api/proxmox/nodes</code>
  </button>
</div>
```
:::

## Row {height="33%"}

::: {.card title="Proxmox VM Inventory"}
```{=html}
<table class="ops-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>VMID</th>
      <th>Name</th>
      <th>Status</th>
      <th>vCPU</th>
      <th>Memory</th>
      <th>Uptime</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="vm-table-body">
    <tr><td colspan="6">Loading</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```
:::

::: {.card title="Metric Series Snapshot"}
```{=html}
<table class="ops-table">
  <thead class="sr-only">
    <tr>
      <th>Metric</th>
      <th>Value</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><th>Deployments</th><td id="deployments-value">Loading</td></tr>
    <tr><th>PVC phases</th><td id="pvc-value">Loading</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Container CPU series</th><td id="container-series-value">Loading</td></tr>
    <tr><th>Prometheus up series</th><td id="up-series-value">Loading</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```
:::

```{=html}
<script>
const OPS_API_BASE = "https://ops-api.mintcocoa.cc";
let selectedEndpoint = "/api/ops/summary";
let selectedTitle = "Ops Summary";

const setText = (id, value) => {
  const element = document.getElementById(id);
  if (element) element.textContent = value;
};

const escapeHtml = (value) => String(value ?? "")
  .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
  .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
  .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
  .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
  .replaceAll("'", "&#039;");

const statusPill = (value) => {
  const safe = String(value ?? "unknown").toLowerCase();
  return `<span class="ops-pill ${escapeHtml(safe)}">${escapeHtml(value ?? "unknown")}</span>`;
};

const formatNumber = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || Number.isNaN(Number(value))) return "-";
  return Number(value).toLocaleString("en-US", { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
};

const formatBytes = (value) => {
  const bytes = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(bytes) || bytes <= 0) return "-";
  const units = ["B", "KiB", "MiB", "GiB", "TiB"];
  let size = bytes;
  let index = 0;
  while (size >= 1024 && index < units.length - 1) {
    size /= 1024;
    index += 1;
  }
  return `${size.toFixed(index === 0 ? 0 : 1)} ${units[index]}`;
};

const formatDuration = (seconds) => {
  const total = Number(seconds);
  if (!Number.isFinite(total) || total <= 0) return "-";
  const days = Math.floor(total / 86400);
  const hours = Math.floor((total % 86400) / 3600);
  if (days > 0) return `${days}d ${hours}h`;
  return `${hours}h`;
};

const fetchJson = async (endpoint) => {
  const response = await fetch(`${OPS_API_BASE}${endpoint}`, { cache: "no-store" });
  const payload = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
  if (!response.ok) {
    const message = payload.detail ?? `${response.status} ${response.statusText}`;
    throw new Error(typeof message === "string" ? message : JSON.stringify(message));
  }
  return payload;
};

const setMapStatus = (id, value) => {
  const element = document.getElementById(id);
  if (!element) return;
  const safe = String(value ?? "unknown").toLowerCase();
  element.className = `ops-pill ${safe}`;
  element.textContent = value ?? "unknown";
};

const updateSelectedEndpoint = (endpoint, title, run = true) => {
  selectedEndpoint = endpoint;
  selectedTitle = title;
  setText("selected-title", title);
  setText("selected-endpoint", endpoint);

  const link = document.getElementById("open-endpoint-link");
  if (link) link.href = `${OPS_API_BASE}${endpoint}`;

  document.querySelectorAll("[data-endpoint]").forEach((element) => {
    element.classList.toggle("active", element.dataset.endpoint === endpoint);
  });

  if (run) runSelectedEndpoint();
};

const runSelectedEndpoint = async () => {
  const output = document.getElementById("endpoint-output");
  if (output) output.textContent = `GET ${selectedEndpoint}\nLoading`;

  try {
    const payload = await fetchJson(selectedEndpoint);
    if (output) output.textContent = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
  } catch (error) {
    if (output) output.textContent = `GET ${selectedEndpoint}\nError: ${error.message}`;
  }
};

const loadDashboard = async () => {
  const health = await fetchJson("/api/health");
  const summary = await fetchJson("/api/ops/summary");

  const prom = summary.prometheus?.data;
  const node = summary.proxmoxNodes?.data?.nodes?.[0];
  const vms = summary.proxmoxVMs?.data?.resources ?? [];
  const runningVms = vms.filter((vm) => vm.status === "running").length;

  const healthDot = document.getElementById("health-dot");
  if (healthDot) healthDot.className = `ops-dot ${health.ok ? "ok" : "fail"}`;
  setText("health-text", health.ok ? "Ops API healthy" : "Ops API degraded");
  setText("health-prometheus", health.prometheus);
  setText("health-proxmox", health.proxmox);
  setText("health-auth", health.proxmoxAuthMode);
  setMapStatus("map-api-status", health.ok ? "up" : "down");
  setMapStatus("map-prom-status", health.prometheus === "ok" ? "up" : "down");
  setMapStatus("map-pve-status", health.proxmox === "ok" ? "up" : "down");

  setText("targets-value", `${prom?.targets?.up ?? "-"} / ${prom?.targets?.total ?? "-"}`);
  setText("targets-detail", `${prom?.targets?.down ?? "-"} down targets`);
  setText("pods-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.pods));
  setText("pods-detail", `${formatNumber(prom?.series?.deployments)} deployments observed`);
  setText("node-value", node?.node ?? "-");
  setText("node-detail", `${node?.status ?? "unknown"} · ${formatBytes(node?.mem)} / ${formatBytes(node?.maxmem)}`);
  setText("vm-value", `${runningVms} / ${vms.length}`);
  setText("vm-detail", "running / total qemu resources");

  setText("deployments-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.deployments));
  setText("pvc-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.pvcPhases));
  setText("container-series-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.containerCpuSeries));
  setText("up-series-value", formatNumber(prom?.series?.up));
  setText("updated-at", new Date((summary.generatedAt ?? Date.now() / 1000) * 1000).toLocaleString());

  const body = document.getElementById("vm-table-body");
  if (body) {
    body.innerHTML = vms
      .slice()
      .sort((a, b) => Number(a.vmid ?? 0) - Number(b.vmid ?? 0))
      .map((vm) => `
        <tr>
          <td>${escapeHtml(vm.vmid ?? "-")}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(vm.name ?? vm.id ?? "-")}</td>
          <td>${statusPill(vm.status)}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(vm.maxcpu ?? "-")}</td>
          <td>${formatBytes(vm.mem)} / ${formatBytes(vm.maxmem)}</td>
          <td>${formatDuration(vm.uptime)}</td>
        </tr>
      `)
      .join("");
  }
};

loadDashboard().catch((error) => {
  const healthDot = document.getElementById("health-dot");
  if (healthDot) healthDot.className = "ops-dot fail";
  setMapStatus("map-api-status", "down");
  setMapStatus("map-prom-status", "error");
  setMapStatus("map-pve-status", "error");
  setText("health-text", "Ops API fetch failed");
  setText("targets-value", "Error");
  setText("targets-detail", error.message);
  setText("updated-at", new Date().toLocaleString());
});

document.querySelectorAll("[data-endpoint]").forEach((element) => {
  element.addEventListener("click", () => {
    updateSelectedEndpoint(
      element.dataset.endpoint,
      element.dataset.title ?? element.dataset.endpoint,
    );
  });
});

document.getElementById("run-endpoint-button")?.addEventListener("click", runSelectedEndpoint);
updateSelectedEndpoint(selectedEndpoint, selectedTitle, false);
runSelectedEndpoint();
</script>
```
